title: Cutover Stack Closeout Normalization
objective: Normalize the remaining repo-owned cutover-stack documents whose top sections still presented cutover and relocation work as active launch plans even though the boundary move and the highest-leverage residue slices are already closed.
dependency_note: After Packet 103 demoted the older workspace planning stack, the next remaining current-looking residue sat in the cutover stack itself: several high-leverage repo-owned cutover documents still labeled themselves as active working plans and carried outdated next-target wording even though the underlying cutover and early residue work were already complete.
execution_scope: Update the top sections of the repo foundation plan, parent-root classification matrix, authority relocation plan, and publication-boundary dependency inventory so they read as executed closeout guidance.
Refresh the dependency inventory's remaining-target list to reflect the residue slices already completed through Packets 100 through 103.
Preserve the deeper body content as cutover and closeout provenance rather than rewriting the whole document set.
forbidden_scope: broad historical-content rewrite beyond top closeout normalization and queue refresh
success_criteria: The four touched cutover-stack docs now lead as executed closeout guidance instead of stale active launch plans.
The publication-boundary dependency inventory explicitly records the residue slices already closed through Packets 100 through 103.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and moves the next lane to deeper packet-history and legacy planning residue rather than cutover-stack wording drift.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path docs/architecture/APEX-REPO-FOUNDATION-AND-CUTOVER-PLAN-2026-05-07.md -Pattern '^Status: Executed cutover baseline with residual structure-governance tracking','^Closeout interpretation note:','^Current routing:'

Select-String -Path docs/architecture/APEX-PARENT-ROOT-CLASSIFICATION-MATRIX-2026-05-07.md -Pattern '^Status: Executed cutover classification baseline with residual residue tracking','^Closeout interpretation note:','^Current routing:'

Select-String -Path docs/architecture/APEX-AUTHORITY-RELOCATION-PLAN-2026-05-07.md -Pattern '^Status: Executed relocation bridge with residual mirror-demotion tracking','^Closeout interpretation note:','^Current routing:'

Select-String -Path docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md -Pattern '^Status: Updated closeout inventory after canonical cutover and residue normalization','^Closeout interpretation note:','^## Highest-Leverage Remaining Targets'

Select-String -Path docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md -Pattern 'repo-owned current-truth authority normalization','parent-root mirror routing normalization','parent-root `.claude` entrypoint hardening','early workspace planning demotion'
next_action: Return repo-foundation routing to older packet-history and legacy planning surfaces that still preserve pre-cutover operator wording without equivalent current-routing context.
